name: elnora-websearch-tools
description: Web search for Claude Code — one plugin that wires up the official CLIs and Agent Skills of Exa, Tavily, Perplexity, Firecrawl, and Valyu. Single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: websearch
plugins.description: Comprehensive web search capability from five providers' official tooling — guided setup, per-provider opt-in, a routing skill that picks the right provider per task, and one command to keep every official CLI and skill on its latest release.
